arts.ttl: Chelsea stumble in Girma debut, Arsenal fight back, Juve open a gap
arts.sum: Naomi Girma's dream debut was cut short as Chelsea dropped points, Arsenal won a seven-goal thriller and Juventus stake their claim for the Serie A title.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano discloses Arsenal’s new ‘top candidate’ for sporting director role
arts.sum: Arsenal are in the market for a new sporting director, and one of the names in the mix is Andrea Berta, according to Fabrizio Romano. The Italian left Atletico Madrid at the start of January after spending over a decade at the club. arts.ttl: Arsenal prepare HUGE Saliba deal amid Real Madrid rumours
arts.sum: Arsenal have reportedly prepared a contract extension offer for William Saliba as they look to fend off significant transfer interest from Real Madrid . The Gunners have already prepared their contract offer, although they aren’t set to enter into negotiations for several months, with the club aiming to complete a deal ahead of the 2025-26 campaign.

arts.ttl: The signing Andrea Berta made that shows he can finally solve Arsenal's striker problem - opinion
arts.sum: Andrea Berta signed one of the best strikers in the world ✅

arts.ttl: Euro giants monitoring Arsenal duo in case their star attacker leaves in the summer
arts.sum: Arsenal attacking duo Gabriel Martinelli and Leandro Trossard are being monitored by Serie A giants AC Milan, according to GiveMeSport. Milan are currently considering their options in the market for the left-wing position with Rafael Leao facing an uncertain future at the Italian club.
